mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, display_no, real_name, gender, birth_date, avatar, mobile, id_card, tutor_type, degree, university, university_id, major, grade_year, identity_detail, high_school, hometown_province, email, wechat, tags, city_id, district_id, address, latitude, longitude, teaching_method, price_min, price_max, salary_remark, free_trial, audit_status, audit_remark, is_star, is_verified, sort, view_count, success_count, subjects, grades, certificates_desc, login_count, last_login_time, last_published_at, show_success_record
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from tutor_profile
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tutor_profile (id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, real_name, gender, birth_date, avatar, mobile, id_card, tutor_type, degree, university, major, grade_year, tags, city_id, district_id, address, latitude, longitude, price_min, price_max, free_trial, audit_status, audit_remark, sort, view_count, success_count, display_no, teaching_method, university_id, high_school, hometown_province, certificates_desc, salary_remark, is_star, is_verified, login_count, last_login_time, show_success_record, teaching_experience, self_introduction) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{birthDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tutorType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{degree,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{university,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{major,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gradeYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{longitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{freeTrial,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{auditStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{displayNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teachingMethod,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{universityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{highSchool,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hometownProvince,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificatesDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salaryRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isStar,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{isVerified,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{loginCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{showSuccessRecord,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{teachingExperience,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{selfIntroduction,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into tutor_profile
id,
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
status_id,
user_id,
real_name,

mapper.update:
update tutor_profile
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status_id = #{record.statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
real_name = #{record.realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{record.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
birth_date = #{record.birthDate,jdbcType=DATE},
avatar = #{record.avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{record.mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id_card = #{record.idCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tutor_type = #{record.tutorType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
degree = #{record.degree,jdbcType=TINYINT},
university = #{record.university,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
major = #{record.major,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grade_year = #{record.gradeYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tags = #{record.tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
subjects = #{record.subjects,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grades = #{record.grades,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city_id = #{record.cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
district_id = #{record.districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
latitude = #{record.latitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
longitude = #{record.longitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_min = #{record.priceMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_max = #{record.priceMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
free_trial = #{record.freeTrial,jdbcType=TINYINT},
audit_status = #{record.auditStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
audit_remark = #{record.auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
view_count = #{record.viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
success_count = #{record.successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
teaching_experience = #{record.teachingExperience,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
self_introduction = #{record.selfIntroduction,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
display_no = #{record.displayNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teaching_method = #{record.teachingMethod,jdbcType=TINYINT},
university_id = #{record.universityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
high_school = #{record.highSchool,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hometown_province = #{record.hometownProvince,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
certificates_desc = #{record.certificatesDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salary_remark = #{record.salaryRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_star = #{record.isStar,jdbcType=TINYINT},
is_verified = #{record.isVerified,jdbcType=TINYINT},
login_count = #{record.loginCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_login_time = #{record.lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_published_at = #{record.lastPublishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
show_success_record = #{record.showSuccessRecord,jdbcType=TINYINT},

update tutor_profile
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status_id = #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
birth_date = #{birthDate,jdbcType=DATE},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id_card = #{idCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tutor_type = #{tutorType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
degree = #{degree,jdbcType=TINYINT},
university = #{university,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
major = #{major,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grade_year = #{gradeYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tags = #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
subjects = #{subjects,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grades = #{grades,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city_id = #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
district_id = #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_min = #{priceMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_max = #{priceMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
free_trial = #{freeTrial,jdbcType=TINYINT},
audit_status = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
audit_remark = #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
view_count = #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
success_count = #{successCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
teaching_experience = #{teachingExperience,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
self_introduction = #{selfIntroduction,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
display_no = #{displayNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teaching_method = #{teachingMethod,jdbcType=TINYINT},
university_id = #{universityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
high_school = #{highSchool,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hometown_province = #{hometownProvince,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wechat = #{wechat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
identity_detail = #{identityDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
certificates_desc = #{certificatesDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salary_remark = #{salaryRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_star = #{isStar,jdbcType=TINYINT},
is_verified = #{isVerified,jdbcType=TINYINT},
login_count = #{loginCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_published_at = #{lastPublishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
show_success_record = #{showSuccessRecord,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
